news.title: AI/ML hiring up 23% YoY in India tech, Series-B+ startups driving demand
news.snippet: Hiring for AI/ML roles in India is up 23% year-on-year per LinkedIn data, with Series-B+ startups accounting for 41% of net new positions. Mid-career engineers (3-7 years) seeing the strongest demand, salary bands up 15-22% for proven AI builders.

news.title: Tech hiring in India bounces back: ET-Naukri Index hits 18-month high
news.snippet: The ET-Naukri JobSpeak Index for technology hiring touched its highest level in 18 months in April 2026, led by demand at fintech, AI-native startups, and product unicorns. Senior roles (5+ years) leading the rebound; entry-level still soft post-2024 layoffs.

news.title: Indian fintech firms ramp up backend, infra hiring as RBI tightens compliance
news.snippet: PhonePe, Razorpay, Cred, and Pine Labs collectively added 2,400+ backend and infra engineering roles in Q1 2026, driven by RBI compliance requirements + scaling pressure. Median package ₹28-34 LPA for senior backend engineers.

news.title: Mass-recruiter shops see CSE intake fall 18% as product cos pick top quartile early
news.snippet: TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and Cognizant collectively reduced CSE campus intake by 18% YoY in 2024-25 cohort. Top-quartile CSE talent increasingly picked off by product unicorns + Series-B startups in pre-placement offers, leaving mass-recruiters with second-tier options.
